scene_input.scene_summary: The Quraysh messenger shares the rumor with his fellow Quraysh, who eagerly listen.
scene_input.key_visual_action: Quraysh messenger speaking to a group of Quraysh

schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 280
schema_output.moral_lesson: The importance of sharing news and information with the community

characters.name: Quraysh messenger
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a deep blue woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades

characters.name: Quraysh elder
characters.appearance: slender older man with slightly stooped shoulders, wearing an off-white thobe and plain brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering

characters.name: Quraysh crowd
characters.appearance: various ages and builds, all wearing traditional Quraysh attire

schema_output.narrative_text: A Quraysh messenger arrives at the marketplace to share a rumor with his fellow Quraysh. They eagerly listen, their faces filled with excitement.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. Bustling 7th century Quraysh marketplace with a vibrant mix of earthy tones and warm golden light. A group of Quraysh men, dressed in traditional attire, gather around a central figure seen entirely from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a deep blue woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades. The central figure speaks to the crowd, their voice filled with enthusiasm and conviction. To the left, a slender older man with slightly stooped shoulders, wearing an off-white thobe and plain brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering, listens intently, his hands clasped together in anticipation. The rest of the crowd is depicted in the background, their faces filled with excitement and curiosity. Soft warm golden light, lively and engaging mood. Wide shot from a slightly elevated angle. Earthy tones, golden, and deep blue palette with the deep blue cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
